patch.value: Items whose deadline is before today but are not closed/canceled are overdue. Surface them: ASCII with a distinct trailing glyph (e.g. OVERDUE marker / ! deadline), HTML with a red/warning color on the row or due-date label. Data already available (deadline + status + opts.today). Additive; must not change default layout width or break golden output.
Highlight overdue / deadline-risk items in Gantt charts
